name: 恶魔的房间 The Demon's Room
developer: Shanghai Yunyong Culture Media Co., Ltd
publisher: Shanghai Yunyong Culture Media Co., Ltd
short_description: 《The Demon's Room》is a horror suspense interactive video game. Players need to establish a good feeling with the characters, and the plot triggers and selects to influence the story. The game contains many ways of playing. With the deepening of the plot, players can unlock 11 story endings.
detailed_description: 《The Demon's Room》is a horror suspense interactive video game. The game tells an incredible event that the protagonist and four female colleagues have experienced together in a holiday house somewhere. Players need to establish a good feeling with the characters, and the plot triggers and selects to influence the story. At the same time, the game contains many ways of playing, such as fun games, puzzles, avoidance and QTE. With the deepening of the plot, players can unlock 11 story endings. Who are their identities? What is the truth of the story? Look forward to your exploration!
about_the_game: 《The Demon's Room》is a horror suspense interactive video game. supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
